Klasse Node

java.lang.Object
boardLogic.Node
public class Node extends Object
Represents a node in the game board. Each node can contain a stone and has a list of neighboring nodes. Nodes are uniquely identified by their ID.

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    private final int
    id
     
    private final List<Node>
    neighbors
     
    private Stone
    stone

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor

    Adds a given node to the list of neighbors.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Felddetails

    • id

      private final int id

    • stone

      private Stone stone

    • neighbors

      private final List<Node> neighbors

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Node

      public Node(int id)
      Constructs a node with the given ID. Initializes the node with no Stone and an empty list of neighbors.
      Parameter:
      id - The unique identifier of the node.

  • Methodendetails

    • isOccupied

      public boolean isOccupied()
      Checks whether this node contains a Stone or not.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if a stone is placed on this node, false otherwise.

    • addNeighbor

      public void addNeighbor(Node node)
      Adds a given node to the list of neighbors.
      Parameter:
      node - The node that gets added to the neighbors.

    • getNeighbors

      public List<Node> getNeighbors()
      Getter for the list containing all neighbor nodes.
      Gibt zurück:
      List containing all neighbor nodes

    • placeStone

      public void placeStone(Stone stone)
      Assigns the given Stone to this node and vice versa. Can only possess one stone at a time.
      Parameter:
      stone - The stone that gets assigned to this node.
      Löst aus:
      IllegalStateException - if the node is already occupied.

    • removeStone

      public void removeStone()
      Removes the assigned stone from this node.
      Löst aus:
      IllegalStateException - if the node doesn't contain a stone

    • getID

      public int getID()
      Getter for the node's ID.
      Gibt zurück:
      The current ID of the node.

    • getStone

      public Stone getStone()
      Getter for the node's stone.
      Gibt zurück:
      The current stone of the node. Null if not assigned.

    • deepCopy

      public Node deepCopy(PlayerEntity currentPlayer, PlayerEntity opponent)
      Creates a deep copy of this node including its stone (if present), but without neighbor references. Neighbors must be connected separately.
      Parameter:
      currentPlayer - The copied current player.
      opponent - The copied opponent player.
      Gibt zurück:
      A new Node with the same ID and copied stone.
